name: stackra/sentry
purpose: Sentry error tracking and monitoring with attribute-driven scope enrichment — tag any invokable class with #[AsSentryContext] and it applies to every event.
capabilities: Invokable(Scope $scope) signature for Sentry scope enrichment
Priority ordering + enabled toggle per provider
when_to_use: Any package needs to enrich Sentry events with tenant / user / feature / request context tags.
when_not_to_use: For structured JSON log lines or PSR-3 log routing, use stackra/exceptions's LogReporter instead.
